channel.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Sep 1st, 2022
item.description:
Integration

  • Zato - A Python-based ESB and integration platform for healthcare interoperability, automation and orchestration.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Aug 18th, 2022
item.description:
Imaging

  • Kheops - Open source platform for sharing medical images

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Aug 5th, 2022
item.description:
Frameworks

  • LinuxForHealth FHIR Serverstars231 - Modular Java implementation of version 4 of the HL7 FHIR specification.

    • Libraries

  • Asymmetrik FHIR API Serverstars329 - A secure REST implementation for the HL7 FHIR Specification.

    • Imaging

  • Kaapanastars86 - Open source toolkit for state of the art platform provisioning in the field of medical data analysis.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Jul 11th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

  • Python 835 Parserstars30 - A simple-to-use Python interface to EDI 835 Health Care Claim Payment and Remittance Advice files.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Jun 9th, 2022
item.description:
Frameworks

  • Clinical Quality Languagestars198 - Clinical Quality Language is a HL7 standard for the expression of clinical knowledge.

    • Libraries

  • Android FHIR SDKstars253 - The Android FHIR SDK
  • FHIRKit Clientstars132 - Node FHIR client library.
  • FHIRModelsstars131 - FHIRModels is a Swift library for FHIR resource data models.

    • Integration

  • Open eHealth Integration Platformstars133 - An extension of the Apache Camel routing and mediation engine

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare May 2nd, 2022
item.description:
Frameworks

  • Blazestars83 - A FHIR Store with internal, fast CQL Evaluation Engine
  • Sushistars78 - a reference implementation command-line interpreter/compiler for FHIR

    • Integration

  • Google HCLS Data Harmonizationstars116 - an engine that converts data of one structure to another

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Mar 14th, 2022
item.description:
Machine learning

  • MONAIstars3.4k - AI Toolkit for Healthcare Imaging

    • EHR

  • Ripple - NHS-funded, community led initiative working towards an integrated Digital Care Record Platform.

    • Imaging

  • Dicooglestars327 - Dicoogle is an extensible, platform-independent and open-source PACS

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Mar 9th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

  • TorchXRayVisionstars535 - A library for chest X-ray datasets and models. Including pre-trained models.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Sep 1st, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

  • Datamolstars246 - Molecular Manipulation Made Easy. A light Python wrapper build on top of RDKit.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Aug 12th, 2021
item.description:
Imaging

  • Fiji - Open-source platform for biological-image analysis.
  • DICOMcloudstars183 - A standalone DICOMweb server with RESTful implementation of the DICOMweb/WADO services.
  • DICOM Serverstars284 - OSS Implementation of DICOMweb standard.

    • Hardware

  • echOpen - Low-cost (affordable) echo-stethoscope.

    • Data

  • OpenSAFELY - Secure analytics platform for Electronic Health Records in the NHS.

    • Frameworks

  • FHIR Proxystars56 - secure application that acts as an intermediary in the transfer of FHIR data to and from Azure API.
  • FHIR Works on AWSstars267 - FHIR Works on AWS deployment.

    • Integration

  • FHIR Converterstars259 - an open source project that enables conversion of health data from legacy formats to FHIR.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Apr 18th, 2021
item.description:
EHR

  • ERPNext - Modules that help manage patients, appointments, consultations, lab tests, and billing.
  • HospitalRun - Helps provide the most modern Hospital Information System possible to the least resourced environments.

    • Specifications

  • Standard Health Record Collaborative - High quality, computable source of patient information provided by establishing a single target for health data standardization.
  • DICOM Standards Browser - Provides an effective way to learn the DICOM standard and inspect DICOM attributes.

    • Imaging

  • Cornerstonestars1.8k - Open source project with a goal to deliver a complete web based medical imaging platform.

    • Frameworks

  • CareKitstars2.2k - Open source software framework for creating apps that help people better understand and manage their health.

    • Libraries

  • Evil-DICOMstars139 - C# DICOM Library.
  • Python SMART on FHIR clientstars451 - Flexible Python client for FHIR servers supporting the SMART on FHIR protocol.

    • Applications

  • Intervention Enginestars27 - Provides a web-application for data-driven team huddles.

    • Datasets

  • Medical Data for Machine Learningstars5.3k - Curated list of medical data for machine learning.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Apr 12th, 2021
item.description:
Imaging

  • Drishti - Tomography and electron-microscopy data visualizer for both scientists and lay people.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Apr 8th, 2021
item.description:
EHR

  • Bahmni - Electronic Medical Record and hospital system.
  • EHRBase OpenEHR Clinical Data Repository.
  • EHRServerstars140 - CaboLabs EHRServer.
  • EtherCIS - Enterprise Clinical Data Repository.
  • OSCAR EMR - OSCAR McMaster Project.

    • Specifications

  • OpenEHR - Open specification upon which software can be built.
  • OHDSI OMOP Common Data Model - Standardized data model for many healthcare concepts, awesome Github presence including scripts for many major relational databases.

    • Imaging

  • OHIFstars2.1k - OHIF zero-footprint DICOM viewer and oncology specific Lesion Tracker.

    • Dental

  • Open Dental - Dental Practice Management Software.

    • Frameworks

  • API Serverstars100 - FHIR Server to support patient- and clinician-facing apps.
  • Clinical Meteor project - Meteor for FDA, HIPAA, and HL7 compliant applications.

    • Libraries

  • Archiestars46 - OpenEHR Library written in Java.
  • DCMTK - DICOM Toolkit.
  • dicomstars775 - High Performance DICOM Medical Image Parser in GoLang.
  • Fellow Oak DICOMstars855 - DICOM for .NET, .NET Core, Universal Windows, Android, iOS, Mono, and Unity.
  • FHIR protocol buffersstars664 - A Google implementation of protocol buffers for FHIR.
  • php-fhirstars85 - Tools for creating PHP classes from the HL7 FHIR Specification.
  • pynetdicomstars395 - A Python implementation of the DICOM networking protocol.

    • Data

  • Cedar - Open source tool for testing the strength of Electronic Clinical Quality Measure.
  • Infernostars87 - Open source tool that tests whether patients can access their health data through a standard interface.

    • Machine learning

  • Healthcare.ai - Python and R tools for healthcare machine learning.

    • Logistics

  • OpenLMIS - Open source, web-based, electronic logistics management information system (LMIS) software, purpose-built to manage health commodity supply chains.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Jan 4th, 2021
item.description:
Imaging

  • InVesalius - Open source software for reconstruction of computed tomography and magnetic ressonance images.

    • Libraries

  • FHIR .NET APIstars677 - The official .NET API for HL7 FHIR.
  • HAPI FHIRstars1.6k - Java API for HL7 FHIR Clients and Servers.

    • Asset Management

  • Tapirxstars24 - Networked medical device discovery and identification.

    • Logistics

  • ID3Cstars21 - Data logistics system enabling real-time genomic epidemiology.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Oct 6th, 2020
item.description:
Data

  • Snow Owlstars221 - Highly scalable, open source terminology server with revision-control capabilities and collaborative authoring platform features.
  • cTAKES - Natural Language Processing System for extraction of information from Electronic Medical Record clinical free-text.
  • DHIS - District Health Management Information System and data warehouse.

    • EHR

  • GNU Health - Electronic Medical Record, Hospital Management, and Health Information System.
  • FreeMedForms EMR - Electronic Medical Record software.
  • HOSxP - Thai Hospital Information System that aims to ease the healthcare workflow of health centers and central hospitals.
  • LibreHealth EHR - Clinically-focused Electronic Health Record System.
  • OpenClinicstars19 - Medical Records System.
  • OpenEMR - Electronic Health Records and Medical Practice Management application.
  • OpenEyes - Electronic Medical Record application for ophthalmology.
  • OpenMRS - Enterprise Electronic Medical Record System platform.

    • Specifications

  • Open mHealth - Open Standard For Mobile Health Data.
  • SMART on FHIR - Open standards based technology platform.
  • Continuity of Care Document - Continuity of Care Document specifications (free account required).
  • Continuity of Care Record - Specifications for the older form of CCD - sometimes called a "C32".
  • HL7 Version 2 - Specifications for all versions of HL7v2 (free account required).

    • Imaging

  • dcm4che - Clinical Image and Object Management.
  • Horos - Medical image viewer.
  • LibreHealth Radiology - Customized version of LibreHealth Toolkit with additional tools for radiology and imaging professionals.
  • OpenREM - Radiation Exposure Monitoring for physicists.
  • Orthanc - Lightweight DICOM server for healthcare and medical research.
  • VTK - 3 dimensional visualization toolkit supporting a variety of algorithms and modeling techniques.

    • Dental

  • OpenMolar - Dental Practice Management Software.

    • Frameworks

  • FHIRBase - Storage based on the FHIR Standard.
  • Opal - Framework for building clinical applications.
  • Sparkstars211 - Public domain FHIR server developed in C#.

    • Libraries

  • MITK - The Medical Imaging Interaction Toolkit.

    • Integration

  • NextGen Connect Integration Enginestars596 - The swiss army knife of healthcare integration.

    • Bioinformatics

  • Bcbiostars902 - Validated, scalable, community developed variant calling, RNA-seq and small RNA analysis.
  • Wregex - Amino acid motif searching software with optional Position-Specific Scoring Matrix.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Sep 7th, 2020
item.description:
EHR

  • Cottage Med - Electronic Medical Record software designed by physicians.

    • Nursing

  • open-eObs - Observation and clinical assessment platform that offers a real-time view of all patients across a ward.

    • Data

  • IHRIS - Health Information System for management of human resources for health.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Jun 24th, 2020
item.description:
EHR

  • GNUmed - Electronic Medical Record software.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Apr 8th, 2019
item.description:
Frameworks

  • FHIR Server for Azurestars909 - A .NET Core implementation of the FHIR standard.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Nov 26th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

  • Hearthstars26 - A fast FHIR-compliant server focused on longitudinal data stores.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Oct 31st, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

  • Node-hl7-parserstars28 - Open source version of Redox's HL7 v2 to schema-fied JSON parser.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Mar 4th, 2018
item.description:
Laboratory

  • SENAITE - Laboratory Information Management System.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Feb 13th, 2018
item.description:
Imaging

  • DICOM Web Viewer - JavaScript/HTML5-based DICOM viewer with standard tools and a focus on supporting various screen sizes.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Feb 8th, 2018
item.description:
PHR

  • HealthLockerstars70 - Elixir-based personal health record.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Dec 5th, 2017
item.description:
Imaging

  • Papayastars462 - Pure JavaScript medical research image viewer.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare May 17th, 2017
item.description:
EMPI

  • MEDIC Client Registry RIstars13 - The Mohawk College MARC-HI/MEDIC Client Registry EMPI Implementation.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Apr 22nd, 2017
item.description:
Hardware

  • OpenAPS - The Open Artificial Pancreas System project is an open and transparent effort to make safe and effective basic Artificial Pancreas System.

    • Imaging

  • 3D Slicer - Cross-platform application for analyzing, visualizing and understanding medical image data.
  • GIMIAS - Extensible image computing and simulation software with an emphasis on specific workflows.
  • ITK-SNAP - Interactive software for 3 dimensional image navigation, annotation, and automatic segmentation with an emphasis on user-friendliness.
  • ITK - Toolkit used for the development of image segmentation and image registration programs with leading-edge algorithms in 2 and 3 dimensions.

    • Data

  • Caisis - Oncology research software with a Patient Data Management System.

    • EHR

  • Open Hospital - Electronic Medical Record software for underprivileged rural hospitals.
  • MedinTux - French Medical Practice Management System.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Apr 20th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

  • Health data standardsstars0 - Ruby library for generating and consuming various healthcare related formats. These include HITSP C32, QRDA Category I, and QRDA Category III.

    • Data

  • Synthea Patient Generatorstars1.5k - Synthetic patient generator that models the medical history of synthetic patients.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Apr 11th, 2017
item.description:
Frameworks

  • Intervention Engine FHIR Serverstars97 - Generic FHIR server implementation in GoLang.
  • Swift-SMARTstars119 - Swift SMART on FHIR framework for iOS and OS X.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Apr 1st, 2017
item.description:
EHR

  • Odoo Medicalstars241 - Universal Health and Hospital Information System.
  • openMAXIMSstars55 - Full Patient Administration System designed for the NHS.

    • Prescribing

  • OpenEP - Suite of medicines management apps that improve the safety and efficiency of prescribing and medicines management.

    • Frameworks

  • ResearchKitstars5.5k - Software framework that makes it easy to create apps for medical research or for other research projects.

    • Libraries

  • Python HL7stars229 - Simple library for parsing messages of HL7 version 2.x into Python objects.

    • PHR

  • Tidepool - Data platform to reduce the burden of Type 1 Diabetes.

    • Research

  • i2b2 - Research data warehouse.

    • Integration

  • OpenHIM - Health information mediator.

    • Hardware

  • Glucostars23 - Glucometer.
  • Murgen - Ultrasound imaging development kit.

    • Bioinformatics

  • ADAMstars935 - Genomics analysis platform.
  • Galaxy - Open web-based platform for data intensive biomedical research.

item.title: kakoni/awesome-healthcare Mar 31st, 2017
item.description:
Specifications

  • FHIR - Fast Health Interoperability Resources.
  • StandardHealthRecord - Open specification for health record format, aiming to be more precise than existing formats.

    • Laboratory

  • OpenELIS - Laboratory Information System for Global Health.

    • Libraries

  • fhir.jsstars357 - JavaScript client for FHIR.
  • Node HL7stars47 - Node module that is bridged with the Java Hapi HL7 library.
  • Ruby FHIRstars136 - FHIR client implementation in Ruby.
  • Ruby HL7stars96 - Ruby HL7 library.

    • Applications

  • SMART Pediatric Growth Chartstars65 - Pediatric growth charts.

    • Research

  • LabKey Server - Platform for Translational Research.
